description_long: This is a ball-peen hammer featuring a robust, dark metallic head with a rounded peen on one side and a flat striking face on the other. The head is attached to a medium-brown, slightly contoured wooden handle that appears ergonomic for a comfortable grip. The metal head is smooth and shows no visible signs of wear, rust, or damage, indicating it is either new or well-maintained. The handle is straight with a gentle taper and a natural wood grain finish, providing both strength and shock absorption. No brand markings, logos, or additional attachments are visible on the hammer. The overall design is utilitarian and suitable for metalworking, carpentry, or general urban tool use.
description: A ball-peen hammer with a dark metal head and a smooth, contoured wooden handle. The head features a rounded peen and a flat striking face, with no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the symmetrical ball-peen head with both the rounded and flat faces visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the hammer, with the handle's taper and the rounded peen end of the head most prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the handle and the opposite side of the ball-peen head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and the alignment of the head with the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Contoured wooden handle with a smooth, natural finish and gentle ergonomic taper.
attribute_head_type: Ball-peen hammer head with one rounded peen and one flat striking face, made of dark steel.
